name: Hillhouse Capital
shortDescription: Largest China-focused PE/growth investor in healthcare; transformative checks across BeiGene, Innovent, Junshi, Akeso

name: Qiming Venture Partners
shortDescription: Early-stage VC with deep healthcare practice; backed Innovent, Zai Lab, GenScript, Brii

name: Lilly Asia Ventures
shortDescription: Eli Lilly's spinout China-focused biotech VC; portfolio includes BeiGene, Innovent, Junshi, Tigermed, Zai Lab

name: HongShan (formerly Sequoia China)
shortDescription: Split from Sequoia in 2023 and rebranded HongShan; healthcare is one of three core practices
